title: Support Our Mission
subtitle: Your generosity helps us empower more boys through the art of cooking.
why_text:
Every contribution to Boys Who Cook directly funds our programs, cooking supplies, and  events. As a nonprofit organization, we rely on the generosity of donors like you to keep our programs free and accessible to all boys, regardless of their background or financial situation.

When you donate to Boys Who Cook, you're not just funding cooking classes you're investing in the future of young men in our community. You're giving them skills, confidence, and opportunities that will last a lifetime.

impact.description: Provides funds to start a workshop
